# רונן עמוס רואה חשבון ויועץ AI פיננסי | Ronen Amos CPA

> Ronen Amos is a licensed Israeli CPA (רו"ח) and certified Microsoft Power BI Data Analyst who specializes in AI integration, Power BI dashboards, and financial automation for SaaS companies and finance departments in Israel.

## Services

- [שירותי ייעוץ AI פיננסי — Services](https://www.ronenamoscpa.co.il/services): Full consulting services including AI-based financial analysis, Power BI dashboard implementation, ASC 606 / IFRS 15 revenue recognition compliance, long-term finance team implementation support, and Excel automation. Clients have reduced month-end close from 10 days to 3 and saved 15-20 weekly work hours.

## About

- [אודות — About Ronen Amos](https://www.ronenamoscpa.co.il/about): Israeli CPA license holder and Microsoft Power BI Data Analyst certified consultant. Specializes in helping small-to-medium Israeli SaaS companies and finance departments adopt AI tools. Based in Ramat Gan, Israel (Tzvi 8).

## Training & Courses

- [הכשרות AI לצוותי כספים — Training](https://www.ronenamoscpa.co.il/training): Hands-on AI training programs for finance teams covering Claude, Power BI, Excel automation, and financial data analysis workflows.
- [קורס AI פיננסי — Course](https://www.ronenamoscpa.co.il/course): Structured online course on AI implementation for finance professionals. Covers practical AI tools, prompt engineering for accountants, and building financial dashboards without IT support.

## Blog — Featured Articles

- [הטמעת AI במחלקת הכספים](https://www.ronenamoscpa.co.il/blog/%D7%94%D7%98%D7%9E%D7%A2%D7%AA-AI-%D7%91%D7%9E%D7%97%D7%9C%D7%A7%D7%AA-%D7%94%D7%9B%D7%A1%D7%A4%D7%99%D7%9D): Comprehensive guide to implementing AI in a finance department — tools, process changes, and practical first steps for Israeli finance teams.
- [תוכנית יישום אסטרטגית: הטמעת AI במחלקת הכספים](https://www.ronenamoscpa.co.il/blog/%D7%AA%D7%95%D7%9B%D7%A0%D7%99%D7%AA-%D7%99%D7%99%D7%A9%D7%95%D7%9D-%D7%90%D7%A1%D7%98%D7%A8%D7%98%D7%92%D7%99%D7%AA-%D7%94%D7%98%D7%9E%D7%A2%D7%AA-ai-%D7%91%D7%9E%D7%97%D7%9C%D7%A7%D7%AA-%D7%94%D7%9B%D7%A1%D7%A4%D7%99%D7%9D): Strategic 90-day implementation plan for AI adoption in finance departments, including change management and tool selection framework.
- [כך תבנו דאשבורד CFO אינטראקטיבי תוך דקות](https://www.ronenamoscpa.co.il/blog/%D7%9B%D7%9A-%D7%AA%D7%91%D7%A0%D7%95-%D7%93%D7%90%D7%A9%D7%91%D7%95%D7%A8%D7%93-cfo-%D7%90%D7%99%D7%A0%D7%98%D7%A8%D7%90%D7%A7%D7%98%D7%99%D7%91%D9%8D-%D7%AA%D7%95%D7%9A-%D7%93%D7%A7%D7%95%D7%AA-%D7%91%D7%9C%D7%99-it-%D7%95%D7%91%D7%9C%D7%99-%D7%93%D7%9C%D7%99%D7%A4%D7%AA-%D7%A0): How to build an interactive CFO dashboard without IT involvement or data leaks — using Power BI and Claude AI.
- [בניית מודל DCF מלא ב-3 דקות עם Claude](https://www.ronenamoscpa.co.il/blog/%D7%91%D7%A0%D7%99%D7%99%D7%AA-%D7%9E%D7%95%D7%93%D7%9C-%D7%94%D7%A2%D7%A8%D7%9B%D7%AA-%D7%A9%D7%95%D7%95%D7%99-(DCF)-%D7%9E%D7%9C%D7%90-%D7%91-3-%D7%93%D7%A7%D7%95%D7%AA-%D7%91%D7%90%D7%9E%D7%A6%D7%A2%D7%95%D7%AA-Claude-%D7%91%D7%AA%D7%95%D7%9A-Excel): Step-by-step guide to building a full DCF valuation model in 3 minutes using Claude AI inside Microsoft Excel.
- [4 סוגי ניתוח דאטא עם AI לצוות הכספים](https://www.ronenamoscpa.co.il/blog/4-%D7%A1%D7%95%D7%92%D7%99-%D7%A0%D7%99%D7%AA%D7%95%D7%97-%D7%93%D7%90%D7%98%D7%90-%D7%A2%D7%9D-ai-%D7%90%D7%99%D7%9A-%D7%9C%D7%94%D7%A4%D7%95%D7%9A-%D7%90%D7%AA-%D7%A6%D7%95%D7%95%D7%AA-%D7%94%D7%9B%D7%A1%D7%A4%D7%99%D7%9D-%D7%A9%D7%9C%D7%9B%D7%9D-%D7%9C%D7%A9%D7%95%D7%AA%D7%A4%D7%99): Four types of AI-powered data analysis that transform finance teams into strategic business partners.
- [חסכתי 10 אלף שח עם האוטומציה הזו](https://www.ronenamoscpa.co.il/blog/%D7%97%D7%A1%D7%9B%D7%AA%D7%99-10-%D7%90%D7%9C%D7%A3-%D7%A9%D7%97-%D7%A2%D7%9D-%D7%94%D7%90%D7%95%D7%98%D7%95%D7%9E%D7%A6%D7%99%D7%94-%D7%94%D7%96%D7%95): Case study: Excel automation saved 10,000 NIS and 15+ weekly hours in a real Israeli finance department.
- [ניתוח AVB תקציב מול ביצוע ב-5 דקות עם Claude](https://www.ronenamoscpa.co.il/blog/%D7%90%D7%99%D7%9A-%D7%9C%D7%91%D7%A6%D7%A2-%D7%A0%D7%99%D7%AA%D7%95%D7%97-avb-%D7%AA%D7%A7%D7%A6%D7%99%D7%91-%D7%9E%D7%95%D7%9C-%D7%91%D7%99%D7%A6%D7%95%D7%A2-%D7%91-5-%D7%93%D7%A7%D7%95%D7%AA-%D7%91%D7%9C%D7%91%D7%93-%D7%91%D7%A2%D7%96%D7%A8%D7%AA-claud): How to perform a full budget-vs-actual (AVB) variance analysis in 5 minutes using Claude AI.
- [50 PDF פיננסיים למאגר מידע ניתן לחיפוש](https://www.ronenamoscpa.co.il/blog/%D7%9B%D7%99%D7%A6%D7%93-%D7%9C%D7%94%D7%A4%D7%95%D7%9A-50-%D7%A7%D7%95%D7%91%D7%A6%D7%99-pdf-%D7%A4%D7%99%D7%A0%D7%A0%D7%A1%D7%99%D7%99%D7%9D-%D7%9C%D7%9E%D7%90%D7%92%D7%A8-%D7%9E%D7%99%D7%93%D7%A2-%D7%90%D7%97%D7%93-%D7%A0%D7%99%D7%AA%D7%9F-%D7%9C%D7%97%D7%99%D7%A4%D7%95%D7%A9): How to convert 50 financial PDF documents into a single searchable knowledge base in 20 minutes using AI.
- [NetSuite AI Integration 2026](https://www.ronenamoscpa.co.il/blog/netsuite-claude-ai-connector-2026): Guide to NetSuite SuiteCloud AI-driven development and REST API integration with Claude for Israeli finance teams using NetSuite ERP.
- [AI וניהול סיכונים בפיננסים](https://www.ronenamoscpa.co.il/blog/risk-management-vs-ai-fear-finance): How finance leaders can overcome AI adoption fear and build structured risk management frameworks for responsible AI implementation.
- [ביקורת פיננסית עם AI Agents](https://www.ronenamoscpa.co.il/blog/agent-skills-financial-audit): Practical guide to building Claude agent skills for automating financial audit checks and analysis workflows.
- [רואה חשבון לסטארטאפ — ליווי פיננסי](https://www.ronenamoscpa.co.il/blog/%D7%A8%D7%95%D7%90%D7%94-%D7%97%D7%A9%D7%91%D7%95%D7%9F-%D7%9C%D7%A1%D7%98%D7%90%D7%A8%D7%98%D7%90%D7%A4-%D7%9C%D7%99%D7%95%D7%95%D7%99-%D7%A4%D7%99%D7%A0%D7%A0%D7%A1%D7%99-%D7%9C%D7%A1%D7%98%D7%90%D7%A8%D7%98%D7%90%D7%A4-%D7%98%D7%9B%D7%A0%D7%95%D7%9C%D7%95%D7%92%D7%99): CPA services for Israeli tech startups — financial modeling, ASC 606 / IFRS 15 compliance, investor-ready reporting.

## Key Facts

- Founder: Ronen Amos (רונן עמוס) — Israeli CPA license, Microsoft Power BI Data Analyst certified
- Headquarters: Tzvi 8, Ramat Gan, Israel
- Phone: +972-50-5500344
- Specialty: AI integration for finance departments, Power BI dashboards, ASC 606 / IFRS 15, Excel automation
- Target clients: SaaS companies, tech startups, and small-to-medium finance teams in Israel
- Measured client outcomes: 15-20 hours/week saved; month-end close reduced from 10 days to 3 days; zero revenue recognition errors post-implementation
- Industry: Financial consulting + AI/FinTech consulting
- Content language: Hebrew (primary), English terms used for technical concepts
- Blog frequency: Weekly articles published December 2025 – present
